title: begonia lithophila
intro: Begonia lithophila, also known as the 'Moonlight Begonia', is a species of flowering plant in the Begoniaceae family, characterized by its unique, white, or pale-colored leaves and stems that thrive in well-draining environments. The plant is traditionally used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian cultures, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Begonia lithophila include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant and vasodilatory properties. In herbal preparations, Begonia lithophila is often used in teas or infusions, or dried and used in capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
